task: Replace legacy OpenVibe privacy language with Pocket Vibe trust, data flow, diagnostics, and error-code documentation that matches the PWA-first local product and planned metadata-first relay.
constraints: Do not claim relay is already production-live.
Do not claim no data is collected once relay mode is planned.
Do not promise legal compliance beyond what the implementation supports.
Do not change runtime code in this docs-only task.
required_checks: manual review of privacy/security claims against current implementation
done_when: Privacy policy uses Pocket Vibe naming and distinguishes current local mode from planned relay mode.
Security/trust doc defines data classes, E2EE posture, diagnostics opt-in, and threat model.
Error code dictionary gives user-visible recovery categories for connection, auth, runtime, relay, and diagnostics failures.
